Welcome

Your Private Paradise
in the Sahyadris

Perched in the misty, verdant hills of Igatpuri, IAM Heavenly Winds Villa is an exclusive 6 BHK luxury retreat offering sweeping panoramic views, a private swimming pool, and interiors that blend warm wooden elegance with modern comfort.


Whether you're planning a family reunion, a group celebration, a romantic escape, or a corporate offsite — our villa gives your group the entire property: complete privacy, dedicated caretaker support, BBQ evenings, and sunsets over the valley you'll never forget.


Enquire Now

Location

Find Us in Igatpuri

Nestled in the lush Sahyadri hills of Igatpuri, Maharashtra — just a comfortable drive from Mumbai and Nashik. A perfect escape from the city, wrapped in nature.

Distance from MumbaiApprox. 140 km via NH-3 / Mumbai–Nashik Expressway
Distance from NashikApprox. 50 km — easy 45-minute drive
By TrainIgatpuri Railway Station — well connected on the Mumbai–Nashik–Bhusawal line
Nearby AttractionsVaitarna Lake, Tringalwadi Fort, Dhamma Giri Vipassana Centre, Camel Valley, Bhatsa River
Best Time to VisitOctober to March (cool, clear weather) • Monsoon (July–Sept) for lush green landscapes
Open in Google Maps

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"Peace and tranquility, good ambience with well-maintained surroundings. The views from the terrace are absolutely breathtaking at sunrise and sunset. Will definitely return!"

— Farida S., Mumbai
★★★★★

— Zabin K., Nashik

"Very beautiful and calm place. Lovely climate, the villa has everything you need. The caretaker was helpful and the kids loved the bunk bed room! Wonderful memories."

— Priya M., Pune
